IIIT Bhagalpur: Admission | Ranking | Fees

Also Known as

Also known as IIIT Bhagalpur.

Indian Institute of Information Technology Bhagalpur, Bhagalpur College of Engineering (BCE), Sabour, Bhagalpur, Bihar - 813210

Nearest Airport and Railway Station

Bagdogra International Airport
245 km
Jay Prakash Narayan International Airport, Patna

Bhagalpur Junction Railway Station

CAMPUS FACILITIES

RANKING

BodyCategoryRank (Year)
LatestPrevious
National Ranking
India Today Top Engineering Colleges35 (2025)37 (2024)

MODE OF ADMISSION

  • Candidates must appear for the JEE (Main) exam and either secure at least 75% marks (65% for SC/ST/PwD) in Class XII or be within the category-wise top 20 percentile in their respective Class XII board examination. For more details, refer to the JEE Main Performance Criteria in Class XII.
  • Admissions are based on the rank obtained in JEE (Main) through JoSAA Counselling and CSAB Special Round.

COURSES OFFERED

Please choose the course.

B.E./B.Tech. - 4 Years

  • Computer Science and Engineering
  • Electronics and Communication Engineering
  • Mathematics and Computing
  • Mechatronics and Automation

ParticularsAmount
Caution Money (One-Time, Refundable)₹10,000

Tuition Fee (per Semester)₹1,19,790
Other Fees (per Semester)₹11,250
Annual Fees₹1,000
Total₹1,50,740

ParticularsAmount
Hostel Charges (per Semester)₹22,000

Total₹38,000
